mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.board_type AS boardType, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.user_num AS userNum, u.nickname AS authorName, p.view_cnt AS viewCnt, p.like_cnt AS likeCnt, p.created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.post_id) AS commentCnt FROM post p JOIN users u ON p.user_num = u.user_num WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (board_type, category, title, content, user_num, created_at) VALUES (#{boardType}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{userNum}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category} WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_num = #{userNum}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_like_history WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_num = #{userNum}
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET like_cnt = like_cnt + 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_num = #{userNum}
